name: Coweta County Recreation Center
description: Coweta County Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Newnan, GA. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Grantville
description: Grantville is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Grantville, GA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights.

name: Grantville’s Post Street Park Recreation Center
description: Grantville’s Post Street Park Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Grantville, GA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Haralson City Park
description: Come play pickleball at Haralson City Park in Senoia, GA! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: House of Pickleball
description: House of Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Newnan, GA. There are 21 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and lights. You can reserve the courts.
fees: Members only — Only for posted classes

name: Lake Redwine Racquet Complex
description: Private neighborhood court. Courts are locked and require a resident of the neighborhood to be on site to be able to access them.

name: Leroy Johnson Recreation Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Leroy Johnson Recreation Complex in Senoia, GA! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like water, restrooms, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Summergrove Golf & Tennis
description: Come play pickleball at Summergrove Golf & Tennis in Newnan, GA! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.
